title: Dragon Set – Weapons & Armor Resource Pack
description: A high-quality dragon-themed weapons and armor resource pack featuring multiple color variants. Designed to add a powerful fantasy aesthetic to your Minecraft world with detailed textures and unique dragon-inspired designs.
body:
# 🐉 Dragon Set – Weapons & Armor Resource Pack

Dragon Set is a fantasy-themed Minecraft resource pack that adds beautifully designed dragon-style weapons and armor. This pack is perfect for RPG servers, adventure maps, and fantasy worlds that want a powerful and mystical aesthetic.

## ✨ Features
- Dragon-themed weapon textures
- Custom dragon armor designs
- Multiple color variants
- High-quality fantasy-style textures
- Lightweight and optimized resource pack

## 📦 Use Cases
This pack works great for:
- RPG and survival servers
- Custom item plugins
- Fantasy-themed Minecraft worlds
- Adventure maps

## ⚙️ Compatibility
- Designed for modern Minecraft versions
- Works with custom item systems like ItemsAdder or similar plugins

## 📜 Notes
This resource pack focuses on visual improvements only and does not change gameplay mechanics.
